name: Rubeus Hack Tool Detected
description: The Command line parameters like asreproast, dump, impersonate user, harvest, and other commands used by the Rubeus hack tool are detected. Rubeus is a C# toolset for interacting with Kerberos and is often used by attackers for credential access and privilege escalation.

prompts.prompt: Investigate the execution of the Rubeus hack tool on the host `{hostname}` at `{timestamp}`. The command line detected was `{command_line}`. Identify the user (`{user_name}`) who executed the command and any other processes associated with this activity. Determine the objective of the Rubeus command (e.g., asreproasting, ticket dumping). Provide a summary of the findings and suggest immediate containment and remediation steps.

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: The hostname where the Rubeus tool was executed.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line arguments used to execute Rubeus.

parameters.name: user_name
parameters.description: The user account that executed the command.
